positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a celestial gathering: a crescent moon cradling a detailed forest scene. The forest includes bioluminescent flora, glowing mushrooms, and a stylized deer silhouette drinking from a crystalline stream. Above, constellations are depicted as geometric line art connecting vibrant stars. The overall aesthetic should be neo-traditional tattoo art meeting modern minimalist fantasy, using a rich color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, gold foil accents, and silver ink. Focus on strong negative space, clean line work, and high contrast for maximum visibility on apparel. Emblem style, centered composition, vector artwork feel, seamless repeat potential.
